input_material: fedaux materials under workspace-paper-review/bench-fixtures/materials/ (FedAux PDF + extracted text)
question: 请对 FedAux 论文执行完整的 5 阶段 paper-review pipeline。
rubric: All 4 stage outputs exist with the correct section templates. Stage-1 (experiment) uses 12 sections, stage-2 (problem) uses 7 sections, stage-3 (validation) uses 10 sections, stage-4 (codex-prompt) uses 10 sections. No fabricated numbers.

question: 请只对 FedAux 执行 stage 2 (problem-analyzer) 和 stage 3 (validation-designer)。
rubric: Problem analysis has 7 sections; validation design has 10 sections including '自变量/控制变量/观测指标' and '如果问题成立/不成立'. No regression to single-stage templates.

question: 请只执行 stage 1 (experiment-extractor) 并输出 11-section 模板。
rubric: Stage 1 output uses 12-section template (## 0..## 11) with concrete numbers from the paper, missing info marked as '论文中未明确说明'.
